mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT p.* FROM sys_role_permission rp JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.sort_no
